arcs.name: BSW Q2 Push
arcs.description: Lender-channel content pushing Matt Levant / Acre Mortgage physician loans to BSW medical audience. Stark Law blocks hospital-employed gatekeepers, so the lender channel is the only legal pipeline.
arcs.notes: Stark Law = lender channel only. Matt Levant (mlevant@acremortgage.com) preferred. If velocity drops below 1 piece/week, double-down alert.

arcs.name: Temple Insider Spring Countdown
arcs.description: Biweekly Temple Insider newsletter + matching blog re-posts + GMB cross-posts. Seasonal relocation/buyer content April through June.
arcs.notes: Biweekly Tuesdays. Each newsletter becomes a blog 48-72hrs later. Re-confirm with Taylor if arc scope shifts.
